design_philosophy: A high-end, premium e-commerce experience. Focus on a modular Bento Grid layout to organize diverse multi-category products cleanly. Uses strict geometric spacing, high-contrast monochrome base with sharp, vibrant accents, and full RTL/LTR bi-directional design support.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-display
typography.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-body font-bold
typography.instructions: Add Google Fonts/Fontshare links in head. Use standard Tailwind logical text alignment (`text-start`, `text-end`) to automatically flip alignment for RTL. Do NOT use `text-left` or `text-right`.

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8. Span logic: Hero items col-span-12 md:col-span-8 row-span-2, Secondary items col-span-12 md:col-span-4.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.rtl_ltr_strategy: CRITICAL: You MUST use Tailwind's logical properties. Use `ps-*` (padding-start), `pe-*` (padding-end), `ms-*` (margin-start), `me-*` (margin-end). Avoid `pl-*`, `pr-*`, `ml-*`, `mr-*` so the UI naturally mirrors in Arabic mode. Include `<html dir="ltr">` and a state toggle that updates the dir attribute.
layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 w-full

surface_styles.cards: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-gray-300 overflow-hidden relative
surface_styles.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200
surface_styles.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-black
surface_styles.badges: absolute top-4 start-4 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-full bg-black text-white

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactives must explicitly change background and text color.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up entrances for product lists using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.microinteractions: Button active state scale-down (active:scale-95). Product image zoom-in on hover (group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500).

components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn customized components. Inputs must have clear focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:border-transparent).
components_strategy.cart: Use a Shadcn Sheet (Slide-over) component for the shopping cart. The sheet should slide from the `end` (Right side for LTR, Left side for RTL).
components_strategy.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, language toggles, cart buttons) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn', data-testid='lang-switch-btn').

media_and_assets.icons_library: lucide-react (use symmetrical icons where possible, mirror directional icons dynamically using CSS or logic for RTL if needed)

hero_background.description: Abstract luxury golden and dark brown background.
hero_background.placement: Homepage Hero Section (with overlay bg-black/40 or bg-white/40 depending on text contrast)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a Language Switcher in the Header (EN / AR) that toggles the `dir` attribute on the `<html>` element between 'ltr' and 'rtl'.
NEVER use `ml-`, `mr-`, `pl-`, `pr-`, `left-`, `right-`. ONLY use Tailwind's logical properties: `ms-`, `me-`, `ps-`, `pe-`, `start-`, `end-` to ensure full RTL mirroring out of the box.
For the multi-category showcase on the homepage, implement a 'Bento Grid' layout. Example: A large featured product spanning 2 columns/rows, next to smaller category cards.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for English headings and 'Cairo' for Arabic text. You can add these to the document `<head>` via Google Fonts or Fontshare.
Do NOT use generic placeholder text. Populate the store with realistic product names and prices using the provided media assets.

Integrate Shadcn primitives heavily (Sheet for Cart, Dialog for Auth, Select for Sort/Filter) but style them cleanly. Strip away heavy shadows and rely on 1px borders for a premium high-contrast look.
Build the Stripe checkout flow logic connected to the Cart.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
